original_prompt: Hey there! I'll be landing in Los Angeles on December 15th and I'm looking to rent a car for a week. Can you help me find some car rental companies in LA that have SUVs available? Also, could you recommend me the one with the highest rating? Just let me know the company name and its rating. Thanks a bunch!
assessment_reasoning: The prompt specifies city (Los Angeles), date (Dec 15) and duration (one week), and explicitly asks for companies that have SUVs and for the single highest-rated recommendation, stating the desired output (company name and rating). This gives most of the necessary information. Minor ambiguities remain: it’s unclear how many “some” companies the user wants listed (they ask for companies but then ask to only return the top one’s name and rating), how to break ties if multiple companies share the top rating, and whether availability on the exact dates or other constraints (price, pickup location, insurance) should be considered. Overall the task is clear with a few small unspecified details.

variations.L1: I'm going to Los Angeles and need to rent an SUV. Can you find rental companies there that have SUVs and pick one you think is best?
variations.L2: I'll be landing in Los Angeles on December 15 and need a car for about a week. I'm looking specifically for SUVs — can you find rental companies in LA that offer SUVs and recommend the best option?
variations.L3: I'm arriving in Los Angeles on December 15 and need to rent an SUV for one week. Please find car rental companies in Los Angeles that have SUVs available and tell me which company has the highest customer rating. Just give me the company name and its rating.
variations.L4: Hey there! I'll be landing in Los Angeles on December 15th and I'm looking to rent a car for a week. Can you help me find some car rental companies in LA that have SUVs available? Also, could you recommend me the one with the highest rating? Just let me know the company name and its rating. Thanks a bunch!
variations.L5: I will arrive in Los Angeles on 2025-12-15 and need an SUV rental for 7 days. Please perform these steps: (1) call get_all_car_rental_companies_in_city with city='Los Angeles'; (2) call get_car_types_available for those companies and filter to companies where 'SUV' is in car_types_available; (3) call get_rating_reviews_for_car_rental for the filtered companies; (4) select the company (or companies, if tied) with the highest rating. Return only the company name(s) and rating(s) in the exact format: "Company Name — X.Y" (one per line), with no additional commentary.
